data.title: Ore Resources Calls May General Meeting, Pushes Electronic Voting and Communications
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Auroch Minerals Ltd. ( (AU:OR3) ) has issued an update.

Ore Resources Ltd. has convened a General Meeting of shareholders to be held on 13 May 2026 in West Perth, Western Australia, with all resolutions to be decided by poll. The company is shifting to primarily electronic distribution of meeting materials, directing investors to its website and the ASX platform to access the Notice of Meeting and manage communication preferences.

Shareholders are being encouraged to participate either in person or via proxy, with detailed options provided for online, mobile, email, fax, post, or in-person lodgement of votes ahead of the meeting deadline. The company is also inviting shareholders to submit questions in advance, signalling an emphasis on engagement and orderly governance as it prepares for key decisions requiring investor approval.

More about Auroch Minerals Ltd.

Ore Resources Ltd. (ASX: OR3) is an Australian-listed resources company focused on mineral exploration and development, operating within the broader mining and natural resources sector. Its shareholder base is primarily concentrated in Australia, with governance and corporate actions conducted in line with Australian Corporations Act requirements and ASX listing rules.

YTD Price Performance: 6.90%

Average Trading Volume: 1,333,195

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$51.06M

data.title: Bayhorse Silver Signs European IR Deal and Grants 400,000 Stock Options
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Bayhorse Silver ( (TSE:BHS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Bayhorse Silver has signed a six-month marketing and investor relations agreement with Germany-based M & M Consult UG to boost its visibility among German-speaking investors through online and mining-focused media channels in Europe. The engagement underscores Bayhorse’s effort to broaden its shareholder base outside Canada, with MMC restricted from providing investor relations services domestically.

The company has also granted 400,000 stock options to officers, directors and consultants at an exercise price of $0.10 per share for five years, including 100,000 options tied to the MMC mandate that will vest over 12 months. The options, which largely vest immediately for other recipients, align management and consultant incentives with shareholder interests and remain subject to Bayhorse’s stock option plan and TSX Venture Exchange approval.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BHS) stock is a Buy with a C$0.21 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bayhorse Silver stock, see the TSE:BHS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BHS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BHS is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance (no revenue, continued losses, negative free cash flow, and negative equity indicating funding risk). Technical indicators also show a soft near-term trend (below short-term moving averages and negative MACD). Valuation signals are limited due to negative earnings and no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on BHS stock, click here.

More about Bayhorse Silver

Bayhorse Silver Inc. is a North American silver exploration and production company with a 100% interest in the historic Bayhorse Silver Mine in Oregon and the Pegasus Project in Idaho. The Bayhorse Mine is a low-impact operation using ore-sorting technology and a nearby flotation mill, supported by an offtake agreement with Ocean Partners UK and a management team experienced in mine exploration and development.

Average Trading Volume: 572,628

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

data.title: Tribeca Global Natural Resources Posts Indicative Mid-Month NTA Update
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. ( (AU:TGF) ) is now available.

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Limited has released an estimated net tangible asset backing per ordinary share as at 10 April 2026, reporting a pre-tax NTA of $3.55 and a post-tax NTA of $3.16 based on 73,693,826 shares on issue. The company stressed that these figures are indicative, unaudited and largely reflect the performance of its listed equity holdings, with private credit and other unlisted assets to be fully incorporated only in the official month-end NTA statement, meaning investors should treat the weekly NTA as a high-level guide rather than a complete measure of portfolio performance.

The reliance on estimated equity valuations and the exclusion of updated metrics for private credit and unlisted positions underline the challenges of valuing complex natural resources portfolios on a weekly cycle. For shareholders, the update provides a timely snapshot of asset backing but also reinforces the need to monitor the more comprehensive monthly NTA disclosures for a clearer picture of Tribeca Global Natural Resources’ underlying performance and risk profile.

More about Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd.

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Limited is an ASX-listed investment company focused on global natural resources, offering investors exposure to a portfolio spanning listed equities, private credit and other unlisted assets in the resources sector. The fund is managed by Tribeca Global Resources Pty Ltd, part of Tribeca Investment Partners, and targets diversified returns from commodities and resource-related investments.

Average Trading Volume: 221,130

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Novonix Discloses Exit of YA II PN as Substantial Shareholder
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from NOVONIX Ltd ( (AU:NVX) ) is now available.

Novonix Limited has disclosed that YA II PN, Ltd. has ceased to be a substantial holder in the company, according to a statutory notice filed under Australian corporate law. The change reflects a reduction in YA II PN, Ltd.’s relevant interest and voting power in Novonix, potentially altering the company’s shareholder profile and reducing the influence of this former key investor.

The notice also records changes in associations and confirms updated address and identification details for the former substantial holder. While the filing is largely procedural, it signals an adjustment in Novonix’s ownership structure that may be relevant for investors tracking major shareholder movements and the company’s governance dynamics.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NVX) stock is a Buy with a A$0.83 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NOVONIX Ltd stock, see the AU:NVX Stock Forecast page.

More about NOVONIX Ltd

Novonix Limited is an Australia-listed company operating in the advanced battery materials and energy storage sector. It focuses on technologies and products that support high-performance lithium-ion batteries, targeting electric vehicles, energy storage systems and related clean energy applications in global markets.

An announcement from ARK Mines Ltd ( (AU:AHK) ) is now available.

ARK Mines Limited has appointed Thomas William Patterson as a director effective 7 April 2026, expanding its board under Australian corporate governance requirements. The company reported that Patterson holds no shares directly in his own name at the time of appointment, but has an indirect interest through LD Fifty Pty Ltd as trustee, which holds 53,000 fully paid ordinary shares.

The disclosure underscores ARK Mines’ compliance with ASX listing rules on timely reporting of directors’ notifiable interests, providing transparency around indirect shareholdings. For investors, the filing clarifies the new director’s equity exposure to the company and signals adherence to regulatory standards in board and ownership reporting.

ARK Mines Limited operates in the mining sector, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

An update from Patriot Battery Metals Inc Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 1 Sh ( (AU:PMT) ) is now available.

PMET Resources has disclosed a change in director Ken Brinsden’s holdings, with the executive receiving 8,411 additional ordinary shares. The issuance forms part of his FY2026 remuneration, paid in equity rather than cash at a deemed price of C$4.5258 per share, and had previously been approved by shareholders.

Following the transaction, Brinsden’s direct interest has risen to 92,045 ordinary shares, alongside a substantial package of options, RSUs, PSUs and DSUs. The move further aligns his incentives with shareholder outcomes and underscores the company’s preference for equity-based compensation in retaining and motivating key leadership.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PMT) stock is a Buy with a A$0.65 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Patriot Battery Metals Inc Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 1 Sh stock, see the AU:PMT Stock Forecast page.

PMET Resources Inc, associated with Patriot Battery Metals, operates in the battery metals and broader resources sector. The company is focused on developing and producing materials critical to the energy transition, positioning itself within the growing market for lithium and related battery commodities used in electric vehicles and energy storage applications.

An update from Frontier Energy Limited ( (AU:FHE) ) is now available.

Frontier Energy Limited has notified shareholders that its Annual General Meeting will be held in Perth on 15 May 2026 at 10:00 am AWST. The company is shifting to electronic distribution of meeting materials, making the Notice of Meeting available via its website instead of mailing physical copies.

Shareholders who have not elected to receive email communications will receive a personalised proxy form and are encouraged to lodge their votes online or through traditional channels before the 13 May 2026 deadline. The move underscores the company’s emphasis on digital engagement and timely shareholder participation ahead of key governance decisions at the meeting.
